Operation 'getCountryByIso2' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Current description is vague about what 'detailed information' includes. Enhanced description specifies that this returns extended data (vs. basic data from getAllCountries), clarifies the input requirement, and helps AI agents distinguish between this operation and getAllCountries for more targeted queries.

data.current_description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific country by its ISO2 code.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve comprehensive details for a specific country using its ISO2 code. Returns extended country information including geographic, demographic, and administrative data. Requires a valid 2-character ISO2 country code as input.
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about what 'detailed information' includes. Enhanced description specifies that this returns extended data (vs. basic data from getAllCountries), clarifies the input requirement, and helps AI agents distinguish between this operation and getAllCountries for more targeted queries.

message: Operation 'getAllStates' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Added context about the scale of data (247+ countries), performance considerations, and guidance for AI agents to prefer filtered queries. This helps agents make informed decisions about when to use this expensive operation versus more targeted alternatives.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of all states/provinces across all countries. Returns a large dataset (5000+ states).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a comprehensive list of all states/provinces across all 247+ countries. Returns 5000+ records with state identifiers and basic details. Note: This operation returns a large dataset and may have performance implications for real-time applications. Consider using country-specific or state-specific queries for better performance.
data.reasoning: Added context about the scale of data (247+ countries), performance considerations, and guidance for AI agents to prefer filtered queries. This helps agents make informed decisions about when to use this expensive operation versus more targeted alternatives.

message: Operation 'getStateByCode' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details. Original description doesn't clarify that both country and state codes are required inputs. Enhanced description specifies the dual-parameter requirement, clarifies what data is returned, and helps AI agents understand the hierarchical relationship between country and state parameters.

data.current_description: Retrieve details for a specific state/province within a country.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific state/province using its ISO2 code and parent country ISO2 code. Returns state details including geographic and administrative data. Requires both country ISO2 and state ISO2 codes as input parameters.
data.reasoning: Original description doesn't clarify that both country and state codes are required inputs. Enhanced description specifies the dual-parameter requirement, clarifies what data is returned, and helps AI agents understand the hierarchical relationship between country and state parameters.

message: Operation 'getCitiesByCountry' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Added context about the input parameter (ISO2 code), what data is returned (coordinates, administrative info), and guidance to help AI agents choose between country-level and state-level city queries based on their needs.

data.current_description: Retrieve all cities for a specific country.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all cities for a specific country using its ISO2 code. Returns city data including geographic coordinates and administrative information. This operation provides country-level city data; use getCitiesByState for state-specific city filtering.
data.reasoning: Added context about the input parameter (ISO2 code), what data is returned (coordinates, administrative info), and guidance to help AI agents choose between country-level and state-level city queries based on their needs.

message: Operation 'getCitiesByState' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description doesn't specify the required input parameters (both country and state codes). Enhanced description clarifies the dual-parameter requirement, specifies what data is returned, and helps AI agents understand this is the most granular city query option in the API hierarchy.

data.current_description: Retrieve all cities for a specific state/province within a country.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all cities for a specific state/province using country ISO2 code and state ISO2 code. Returns city data with geographic coordinates and administrative details. Provides more granular city filtering compared to country-level queries.
data.reasoning: Original description doesn't specify the required input parameters (both country and state codes). Enhanced description clarifies the dual-parameter requirement, specifies what data is returned, and helps AI agents understand this is the most granular city query option in the API hierarchy.
